values: Component Usage Atlas — Sitecore Marketplace app, Dashboard Widget + Page Context Panel; tenant-wide live in-memory rendering & datasource usage atlas; sourced from storage/marketplace-app-ideas.md row #3

T092_vercel_deploy.description: Deploy site/ to Vercel; record production URL.

T093_cloud_portal_registration.description: Register app at Sitecore Cloud Portal with deployed URL; declare xmc:dashboardblocks + xmc:pages:context-panel extension points; grant scopes xmc.agent.read + xmc.sites.read.
T093_cloud_portal_registration.notes: Requires Org Admin/Owner role; depends on T092.

T094_real_tenant_smoke.description: Real-tenant install + clipped iframe screenshots vs pocs/poc-v2 on 5 axes (layout, typography, color, component anatomy, state fidelity); cancel-with-act flow; permission-denied flow; 60fps loading visual.
T094_real_tenant_smoke.evidence: products/component-usage-atlas/project-planning/plans/test-report-addendum-20260428T140700Z.md; clips under products/component-usage-atlas/test-evidence/20260428-smoke/ (default, scanning, drilldown for both host and POC).
T094_real_tenant_smoke.notes: Captured 2026-04-28 against tenant sitecoresaa516c-chahdevexjoee24-proda41d / solo-website (28 pages, 21 renderings, 54 datasources). Surface: xmc:pages:context-panel via ngrok dev origin. Phase-1 visual = PASS-WITH-CAVEATS — 3 of 5 states captured (default, scanning, drilldown); cancel-with-act + empty deferred (small tenant + page-revert). 2 WARN findings: S2 stats-line scope tenant-vs-page divergence from POC, S3 POC v2 lacks Panel-scanning frame. No FAILs. App registered under placeholder name 'Dog feeding App' (S1). LIVE WALKTHROUGH (user, same session) added 4 product-level findings: S8 datasource rows show GUIDs as both title+subtitle — needs name resolution + row redesign (HIGH); S9 home page shows '(home)' sentinel instead of 'Home' (MEDIUM); S10 datasource-impact drilldown drawer wrongly reuses rendering drawer — POC v2 screen 5 already specifies the correct two-target split (HIGH); S11 missing visual affinity between rendering row and its datasource (MEDIUM). S8+S10 are blockers before external demo.

T113_manual_test_plan.description: Editor-validated manual test plan post real-tenant install — verifies S1, S5 acceptance criteria with real editor users.
T113_manual_test_plan.notes: Depends on T094 + tenant access for representative editor cohort.

stage_history.note: Selected v2 Console Operator after side-by-side POC comparison; POCs completed in this session (v1 index.html, v2 index.html+app.js, v3 app.js).

M1-M6 complete in sequential TDD. 73 of 77 tasks implemented; T092 (Vercel deploy), T093 (Cloud Portal registration), T094 (real-tenant smoke), T113 (manual test plan post-T094) explicitly deferred — require user-supplied tenant credentials and out-of-band stakeholder actions. 216 tests across 32 files; lint/typecheck/build/audit:network/audit:anti-metric all 0.

1 critical + 5 major auto-fixed; 6 minor deferred to user. ADR-0013 telemetry leak (console.log of context IDs in marketplace.tsx) caught + fixed. M5 surface-tag bug for panel-initiated scans fixed. M3 requireContextId bypass + render-time throw wrapped. Final gates all 0; 216/216 tests; PASS.

Phase 1 PASS-WITH-CAVEATS (host-frame WARN-deferred — host URL not user-supplied; T094 pending). 0 critical / 2 major (M_NEW1 withBackoff hardcoded surface; M_NEW2 orphan scaffold ADR-0013 leak) + 1 minor (m_NEW3 unknown virtual-row collision suffix). Phase 2 Developer fixed all 2 majors + the minor; orphan components/examples/ tree deleted; surface threading reaches withBackoff; collision suffix excludes virtual unknowns. Test count 216 → 219; all gates 0 (lint/typecheck/test/build/audit:network/audit:anti-metric/ci). Status transitions to tested_pending_smoke per Marketplace+pending-smoke gate.

Generated README.md (248 lines, replaced M1 stub, preserved smoke-test rule), CHANGELOG.md (13 lines, Unreleased — PRD-000 placeholder awaiting /ship), docs/architecture.md (262 lines, narrative synthesis), docs/decisions.md (70 lines, all 14 ADRs grouped by theme). Screenshot reference placeholder + T094 caveat per memory note. No CHANGELOG entries yet (no ship report).

Status forced to shipped_with_caveats by smoke_outcomes gate — 4 entries pending (T092 Vercel deploy, T093 Cloud Portal registration, T094 real-tenant smoke + clipped iframe vs poc-v2, T113 manual test plan). 64 PRD requirements delivered / 8 partial / 0 deferred-from-scope / 0 cut. ADR compliance 14/14. ~30 friction-log entries (~24 medium / 6 high / 0 critical) — promotion to /cleanup-friction queue offered separately.

Host-frame smoke against real tenant (28 pages). Pages context-panel surface via ngrok dev origin. T094 promoted pending → pass_with_caveats. 3 states captured (default/scanning/drilldown), 2 deferred (cancel-with-act due to fast tenant scan, empty due to mid-capture page revert). 7 findings (S1–S7) recorded in test-report-addendum-20260428T140700Z.md — 0 FAIL, 2 WARN (stats-line scope divergence from POC; POC v2 missing Panel-scanning frame), 5 minor/coverage. T092 (no Vercel deploy — using ngrok) and T093 (registered as 'Dog feeding App' placeholder) remain pending; T113 still pending.

S8/S9/S10/S11 from live walkthrough landed on prd-000. New files: lib/sdk/datasource-name.ts, lib/datasource-tag.ts, components/atlas/datasource-usage-drawer.tsx, plus 3 test files (22 tests). Modified: core/index-builder.ts, lib/sdk/queries.ts, components/atlas/{datasource-impact-group,rendering-impact-list,panel-surface}.tsx. Net: 241 tests / 35 files (was 219 / 32). All gates green: lint 0 errors, typecheck 0, build OK, audit:network OK, audit:anti-metric OK. Visual re-verification in host frame deferred to user (browser session was closed; dev server via ngrok hot-reloads, so refreshing the Pages tab shows the fixes live). Phase-2 reminder: bare-GUID datasources still display as 'Unnamed item' because v1 does not hit Authoring Item API during scan — recommend lazy resolution on drawer-open.

Round 2 design polish driven by live editor feedback against the registered 'Dog feeding App' tenant. Six landing changes: (1) S22 — collapsible mini-accordion on panel sections (RenderingImpactList + DatasourceImpactGroup expose chevron toggles with item counts). (2) S22 — widget-side useDatasourceNames threading: WidgetSurface → WidgetTable → RenderingInlineDetail now resolves GUID datasources via Authoring API (was panel-only). (3) S22 — drawer header padding bumped pr-10 → pr-14 with mr-2 shrink-0 on badges so '1 page' pill no longer crowds the X close button. (4) S22 — independent column scrolling in RenderingInlineDetail (max-h-72 overflow-y-auto + sticky section titles per pane). (5) S22 — 'Item · {short-id}' fallback in deriveDatasourceDisplayName replaces generic 'Unnamed item'; test fixtures updated. (6) S23 — UNIFIED RENDERING TREE on panel surface: <DatasourceImpactGroup /> unmounted from PanelSurface; each rendering row in RenderingImpactList now expands inline to expose a 'See all pages using this rendering →' affordance (opens UsageDrawer) AND the bound datasource line (opens DatasourceUsageDrawer). Plus authoring-resolve.ts response-shape fix — client.mutate('xmc.authoring.graphql') returns body directly at result.data.iN, NOT result.data.data.iN; one week of 'Unnamed item' silent fallback caused by reading the query-rule level on a mutation. console.warn telemetry added for mutate-threw / graphql-errors / zero-resolved-in-batch. README replaces 'Screenshot pending' placeholder with 4 real-tenant screenshots (widget collapsed/expanded, panel overview, panel rendering drawer) under docs/images/. Net: 252 tests / 38 files (was 241 / 35). Updated tests: panel-surface.test.tsx (datasource-impact text → expansion-flow assertion), panel-edge-handling.test.tsx (forbidden-page click now goes through inline-detail expansion). All gates green: lint/typecheck/test/build/audit:network/audit:anti-metric. Planning docs updated (PRD AC-2.4 + FR-3.5 superseded notes, prd-minimal-000 § In-scope, docs/architecture.md § Page Context Panel rewrite, architecture-blueprint table-row note on PanelSurface, task-breakdown T052 reshape note). Framework dogfood patches landed in same commit: client.md § 8b mutation-unwrap callout, xmc.md § 7 + new § 7a (lazy item resolution worked example), 05-ui-designer.md long-list relationship-visibility check, /architect command per-action POC state coverage, host-frame-testing.md long-list affinity axis.

notes: Source: storage/marketplace-app-ideas.md row #3 — Component Usage Atlas (L effort).
discovery: completed (Round 1+2 in /create-prd; full discovery, no brain-dump).
critical_review: completed (Round 1 only; user folded all call-outs into PRD revision rather than running further rounds).

ADRs introduced by /architect: ADR-0007 (scaffold), ADR-0008 (Next.js stay), ADR-0009 (Blok UI), ADR-0010 (singleton state), ADR-0011 (branded loading), ADR-0012 (concurrency 8 + backoff), ADR-0013 (in-iframe telemetry), ADR-0014 (root notFound).

Architect-time open questions OQ-A1..OQ-A4 added: pagesGetComponentsOnPage field-name verification, sitesGetAllPagesBySite pagination, nested-rendering depth — Lead Developer must confirm at scaffold time.

UI design: 3 divergent variants generated by /architect. POCs filled in 2026-04-27 (v1 index.html, v2 index.html+app.js, v3 app.js — initial /architect output had missing files). User selected v2 Console Operator after side-by-side smoke test.
Recommended next stage: /task-breakdown — Lead Developer (06) drives, then QA (07) enriches in place.
